keyPoints: Mother Never Cooks Tasty Meals - M: Master layout, N: No fixed position, C: Children will inherit parent's layout.
Mothers Never Cook Tasty Meals - M: Master layout, N: No fixed position, C: Children will inherit parent's layout. T: Table layout for two or more children.
Table Layout - T: Table layout, L: Layout relative to parent, A: Absolute position not allowed, Y: Y-axis alignment, U: U-axis alignment, P: Position child at bottom or top.
